documentation.value: Displays a block of code with syntax highlighting. Requires Pygments for highlighting support.
The programming language for syntax highlighting (e.g., python, javascript, bash, json).
Optional. Adds line numbers to the code block.
Optional. Comma-separated list of line numbers to highlight (e.g., 1,3,5-7).

signatures.label:
.. image:: path/to/image
   :alt: text
   :width: value
   :height: value
   :scale: percentage

documentation.value: Inserts an image into the document.
The path or URL to the image file.
Alternative text for accessibility.
The width of the image (e.g., 200px, 50%).
Scale the image as a percentage (e.g., 50 for 50%).
Creates a table of contents linking to other documents. Central to Sphinx document organization.
The maximum depth of the tree. Use 1 for top-level only.
Optional caption displayed above the TOC tree.
Optional. Automatically numbers the entries.
List of document names (without .rst extension), one per line.
Creates a note admonition block to highlight important information.
The note content. Must be indented and separated from the directive by a blank line.
Creates a warning admonition block to alert readers about potential issues.
The warning content. Must be indented and separated from the directive by a blank line.
Creates a cross-reference to a labeled location in any document within the project.
The reference label defined with .. _label-name: before a section or element.
Creates a cross-reference to another document by its path (without .rst extension).
The relative path to the document (e.g., intro, guides/quickstart).
Includes the contents of another file at the point of the directive.
The path to the file to include.
